name: Aces Ball Club
about: Aces Ball Club is an indoor sports facility in Santa Rosa, California, featuring state-of-the-art batting cages and golf simulators. The venue is designed for year-round play and training, catering to athletes of all levels with its all-weather environment. It combines premium baseball and softball training technology with golf simulation, offering both casual and serious training options for individuals and teams. The facility emphasizes a high-tech approach to sports improvement, with a focus on data-driven training and premium equipment access.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to two premium Foresight Sports-powered golf simulators
Year-round play regardless of weather conditions
Data-driven training capabilities for performance improvement
Only public golf simulators available in Santa Rosa

food_and_drink.notes: Snack bar available with satisfying treats
Refreshing cold beer available at the snack bar

simulator_hardware.notes: Two indoor golf simulators powered by Foresight Sports

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides golf simulators, but it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the most authentic experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted inside the cages, but the venue offers a snack bar with satisfying snacks and cold beer.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole golf simulation time is not specified, but simulators are available for hourly rentals at $65 per hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Aces Ball Club is kid-friendly, offering batting cages and golf sim suitable for families and youth training.
